title: Frontend Auth-Gated IP Registration with Public Search

requirements.summary: Gate the Register IP page behind Internet Identity authentication while keeping the form and submission logic intact
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users visiting the Register IP page see a sign-in prompt instead of the registration form.
After signing in via Internet Identity, the registration form becomes accessible.
Submitting an IP record without an active Internet Identity session is rejected.

file_operations.description: Add authentication check using useInternetIdentity hook. When the user is not authenticated, render a centered sign-in prompt with a login button instead of the registration form. The prompt should explain that authentication is required to register IP. Only show the existing registration form when identity is present. Use the authorization component to support this requirement. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement the ProfileSetupModal component to prompt first-time users for their name, email (optional), and organisation after Internet Identity login. Use useGetCallerUserProfile hook to check if a profile exists, and useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation to save the profile. Show this modal only when the user is authenticated, profile data has been fetched, and no profile exists yet. Include proper loading states to prevent modal flash. Use the authorization component to support this requirement. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add useGetCallerUserProfile hook that fetches the current user's profile via actor.getCallerUserProfile(). Return custom state with isLoading that accounts for both actorFetching and query.isLoading, and isFetched that checks both actor availability and query.isFetched. Add useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation hook that calls actor.saveCallerUserProfile(profile) and invalidates the currentUserProfile query key on success. Use the authorization component to support this requirement. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Import and render the ProfileSetupModal component within the Layout so it appears on top of all pages when needed. The modal should check authentication state and profile existence to determine visibility. Use the authorization component to support this requirement. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Ensure the IP Database page remains publicly accessible without authentication requirements
acceptanceCriteria: The IP Database page loads and displays all submitted records for unauthenticated visitors.
Search and filter functionality works without login.
Records submitted by any user are visible to all visitors.
No authentication prompt is shown on the IP Database page.

file_operations.description: Review the existing IPDatabase page implementation to ensure it does not check for authentication before rendering. The page should call backend query functions (getAllIPs, searchByTitleOrHash, filterByCategory, filterByJurisdiction) using an actor instance that works for both authenticated and anonymous users. Confirm that useActor hook provides an anonymous actor when no identity is present, allowing public queries to succeed. No authentication gates should be added to this page.
